summary: Mid-level frontend engineer with 4 years of React + TypeScript experience. Strong on accessibility and on the boundary between design systems and product code.

highlights: Owned the migration from CRA to Vite; CI build time fell from 12m to 2m.
Drove the design system rewrite to a token-based architecture used across 4 products.
Led an accessibility audit; brought the marketing site from 67 to 98 on Lighthouse a11y.
Built the customer onboarding wizard with React Hook Form + Zod.
Wrote the first Playwright e2e suite, cutting flaky checkout-test reruns ~80%.

projects.name: DesignSystemV2
projects.description: Token-based design system on top of Radix primitives, distributed as a private npm package consumed by four product surfaces.

projects.name: OnboardingWizard
projects.description: Multi-step onboarding form with conditional branches; used by 100% of new signups.
